final:
module top_module (
        input w,
        input x,
        input y,
        output reg z);assign z = ( ~w & ~x & ~y ) |
				( ~w & x & ~y ) |
				( ~w & x & y ) |
				( w & ~x & y ) |
				( w & x & y ) ;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      z <= ~w & ~x & ~y;
    end
  end

endmodule
